video.title: Fable Is Back: Claude Code and the Harness Difference
video.description:
A tighter topic edit from the livestream: Fable returns, Toby explains why Claude Code feels different from Cursor, why Fable still feels ahead of open/local models, and why comparing models without comparing harnesses creates bad conclusions.

Edit note: Cuts the opening housekeeping and the weakest degradation speculation so the segment stays on Fable, Claude Code, Cursor, open models, and harness quality.

This is a topic-edited cut from the livestream: https://youtube.com/live/1liD1s8HlsQ?feature=share

Original livestream timestamp range(s): 00:22-02:30, 02:30-02:47, 04:26-07:16, 09:26-10:33, 12:13-16:31

Not medical, legal, financial, or training advice. Personal experience and commentary.
